name: Tarim: Guardians
short_description: Somewhere, in some town that may be unknown to all; there was Tarim, a sad but strong hermit that without knowing it or be waiting for it would be forced by itself to enter on a great adventure to save to the town of his childhood, a town without stains and that never had known the fear.
detailed_description:
Somewhere, in some town that may be unknown to all; there was Tarim, a sad but strong hermitthat without knowing it or be waiting for it would be forced by itself to enter on a great adventure to save to the town of his childhood, a town without stains and that never had known the fear.
Tarim is a adventure of action and rol with a campaign about a hero, Tarim and the story about how he saved his people and the sacrifices he had to make it.

Key features:
  • 2 Great characters to play with
  • Leveling Up to be stronger
  • Levels set and carefully developed to achieve a desired gaming experience.
  • Fight with unique bosses.
  • Lots of enemies all of them with different features.
  • 2 Big chapters available to play.
  • Tons of unlockable items.
